title: Johnny Express
tmdbOverview: In the year 2150, Johnny, a lazy Space Delivery Man, must deliver a package on a planet he does not fully understand.
synopsis: Released in 2014, Johnny Express is a animation, comedy and science fiction film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.7 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. An official age rating was not available at the time of writing.
